summary: The Norwegian registry authority's specification of the nine-digit organisasjonsnummer and its weighted modulus-11 check digit. The first eight digits are multiplied by the weights 3, 2, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2 (from the first digit), the products are summed, and the ninth digit is 11 minus the sum's remainder modulo 11; a remainder of 0 gives check digit 0, and a remainder of 1 (which would require check digit 10) means no valid organisation number exists for that payload.
title: Om organisasjonsnummeret
